metadata.description: Scope-safe, memory-backed offensive-security plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: unified-bug-hunter
plugins.description: Scope-safe, memory-backed bug-bounty & red-team plugin — 89 skills, 40 commands, 30 agents, 6 MCP servers. Orchestrates real offensive tooling (subfinder/httpx/nuclei/dalfox/sqlmap/Foundry) with report-derived methodology, a 7-Question false-positive gate, a deterministic fail-closed scope checker, and cross-target pattern learning. Skills auto-load by topic; reports never auto-submit.
